configurePresets.name: windows-conda
configurePresets.description: Use when OpenSSL is provided by a Conda environment. Requires the target Conda env to be activated.

configurePresets.name: windows-system-openssl
configurePresets.description: Use when OpenSSL is installed via the official Win64 installer (https://slproweb.com/products/Win32OpenSSL.html).
